summary: Jung Hanbaek, a former professional gamer, successfully defeats his opponent using high-level skills and mechanical precision. Despite his opponent's initial arrogance and reliance on stat boosts, Hanbaek’s superior reaction time and experience prove decisive. The crowd and observers are stunned by his performance, leading to the imminent public revelation of the 'Romantic Assassin's' true identity.
key_moments: Jung Hanbaek utilizes the 'Fairy's Blessing' skill to boost his speed and attack power.
The opponent attempts to intimidate Hanbaek, but Hanbaek systematically counters his attacks with pro-gamer level mechanics.
The battle concludes with a clean strike by Hanbaek, resulting in the victory of the 'Romantic Assassin' and the start of the identity reveal process.
